title: NEBNext Ultra II Ligation Module (NEB # E7595) for NEBNext Ultra II End Repair/dA Tailing Module (NEB #E7546)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5r35o","text":"This module is part of the Ultra™ II workflow, and is optimized for use with the NEBNext®Ultra II End Repair/dA-Tailing Module (NEB #E7546), for Illumina®-compatible library construction.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":88,"length":1},{"style":"sup","offset":153,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":133,"length":5}],"data":[]},{"key":"793m3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bo4rq","text":"The NEBNext Ultra II Ligation Module is optimized for use with the NEBNext Ultra II End Repair/dA-Tailing Module (NEB #E7546) or the NEBNext Ultra II FS DNA Module (NEB #E7810).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":119,"length":5},{"key":2,"offset":170,"length":5}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"A905485F383945DB8071A000F7DAFA08","url":"https://www.neb.com/products/e7546-nebnext-ultra-ii-end-repair-da-tailing-module"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"14E19ED3C49E45AB81116208752C8357","url":"https://www.neb.com/products/e7546-nebnext-ultra-ii-end-repair-da-tailing-module"}},"2":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"5FB7853163DA4880B65D52957845E3B3","url":"https://www.neb.com/products/e7810-nebnext-ultra-ii-fs-dna-module"}}}}

steps: Add the following products directly to the End Prep Reaction Mixture: A B 1 Component Volume (μl) Per Reaction 2 End Prep Reaction Mixture 60 µl 3 (red) NEBNext Adaptor for Illumina** 2.5 µl 4 (red) NEBNext Ultra II Ligation Master Mix* 30 µl 5 (red) NEBNext Ligation Enhancer 1 µl 6 Total Volume 93.5 µl * Mix the Ultra II Ligation Master Mix by pipetting up and down several times prior to adding to the reaction. ** The NEBNext adaptor is provided in the NEBNext Oligo kit options, which can be found at www.neb.com/oligos. NEBNext Ultra II Ligation Master Mix New England Biolabs Catalog #E7648 NEBNext Ligation Enhancer New England Biolabs Catalog #E7374 NEBNext Adaptor for Illumina New England Biolabs Note: The Ligation Master Mix and Ligation Enhancer can be mixed ahead of time and is stable for at least 8 hours @ 4°C. Do not premix the Ligation Master Mix, Ligation Enhancer and adaptor prior to use in the Adaptor Ligation Step.

Set a 100 µl or 200 µl pipette to 80 µl and then pipette the entire volume up and down at least 10 times to mix thoroughly. Perform a quick spin to collect all liquid from the sides of the tube. Caution: The NEBNext Ultra II Ligation Master Mix is very viscous. Care should be taken to ensure adequate mixing of the ligation reaction, as incomplete mixing will result in reduced ligation efficiency. The presence of a small amount of bubbles will not interfere with performance.
Incubate at 20 °C for 00:15:00 in a thermal cycler with the heated lid off .

Add 3 µl of (red) USER® Enzyme to the ligation mixture from Step 3. USER Enzyme (Multiplex Oligos for Illumina) New England Biolabs Catalog #E7338 Note: Steps 4 and 5 are only required for use with non-indexed NEBNext Adaptors. USER enzyme can be found in most NEBNext oligo kits, all options can be found on the www.neb.com/oligos page. If you are using the indexed UMI adaptor, USER is not needed. Please see corresponding manual for use with UMI on the E7395 product page under the protocols,manuals, and usage tab.
Mix well and incubate at 37 °C for 00:15:00 with the heated lid set to ≥ 47 °C .

DNA is now ready for size selection or cleanup. Note: Please see NEB #E7645/#E7103 manual for recommended size selection/cleanup and PCR amplification protocols. Safe Stop Point: Samples can be stored overnight at –20°C.
creator: Isabel Gautreau
